positive: A stylized and vibrant celestial guardian motif, featuring a majestic, bioluminescent crescent moon embracing a graceful, stylized phoenix in flight. The composition is symmetrical and highly detailed, designed as a central emblem. The phoenix should be rendered with strong feather silhouettes and flowing energy lines, contrasting sharply against the deep indigo and cosmic teal of the night sky. Utilize a high-contrast, limited color palette of gold leaf, sapphire blue, and luminous peach. Incorporate subtle cosmic dust elements and minimalist geometric stellar constellations to frame the main subjects. Clean vector style illustration, perfect for screen printing on apparel, with clear lines and distinct color blocks. Central composition, rule of thirds applied to the celestial arrangement. Concept art quality, deep saturation, professional illustration.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, watermarks, low detail, poor composition, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photography, photorealistic, grimy, messy, gradient fade, sketch, writing
